code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ c: Int) -> Bool
  c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 10 or c == 13
end

fn consider(_ seen: String, _ count: Int, _ tok: String) -> Unit
  ()
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut seen = " "
mut count = 0
mut start = 0
mut i = 0
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(c)
    if is_ws(c)
      if start < i
        let tok = string.substring(input, start, i)
        let marker = " #{tok} "
        if not string.contains(seen, marker)
          seen = "#{seen}#{tok} "
          count = count + 1
        end
      end
      start = i + 1
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if start < n
  let tok = string.substring(input, start, n)
  let marker = " #{tok} "
  if not string.contains(seen, marker)
    seen = "#{seen}#{tok} "
    count = count + 1
  end
end
println("unique=#{count}")
